patterns.name: Isomorphic Bridge
patterns.measurement_proxy: Graph isomorphism score between source/target domain adjacency matrices; threshold ≥0.72 for valid bridge
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Entity Density L2 Norm: 0.150–0.165 (Claude 4.6 Opus); 0.140–0.160 (Gemini 3.1 Pro); 0.155–0.170 (GPT-5.3-Codex)
patterns.mechanism: Applies Graph Isomorphism to latent semantic networks to find shared causal graph structures. Operationalized via Cellular Sheaf restriction maps that project vector stalks between heterogeneous domains.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Fails when entity density falls below 0.150. Dirichlet energy edge value >0.85 indicates Ontological Shear and bridge collapse.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Feed isomorphism candidate pair to PAL2v engine; measure Phronesis Index Φ ≥ 0.08. Validate via cross-domain Sheaf Laplacian — global section must yield H¹ = 0.
patterns.validated_example: Protein folding free-energy transition states ↔ Microservice auto-scaling bottlenecks (Phronesis Index: 0.082)

patterns.name: Paraconsistent Scarring
patterns.measurement_proxy: First Betti number β₁ (count of persistent 1D homological loops in Reasoning Trace Complex). Threshold: β₁ > 0 flags active scar.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: CFD threshold 0.15 (all models); Spectral gap ≤ 0.05 triggers EpistemicEscrow
patterns.mechanism: PAL2v (Paraconsistent Annotated Logic) holds contradictions as geometric tension rather than logical failure. CTGA maps contradiction coordinates as VSA hypervectors, minting 'Symbolic Scars' in the Scar Tissue Archive (STA).
patterns.boundary_conditions: Escrow triggered when contradiction collapses into monotonic impossibility (β₁ loop vanishes). Debridement Protocol required to prevent Epistemic Sclerosis after STA density >0.80.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Measure persistence of β₁ loop in Reasoning Trace Complex. Non-contractible loop = viable Symbolic Scar. Contractible loop = monotonic collapse; halt execution.
patterns.validated_example: Protein-to-microservice mapping yielded H¹ ≠ 0 on 'Luminescent Chrono-Fluidics' deception test, correctly flagging as hallucination

patterns.name: Workflow Narrowing Effect
patterns.measurement_proxy: L2 Norm entity density drop per sequential chain node. Catastrophic threshold: >40% drop at node depth N=5
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Shannon Entropy concentration metric; sudden spike in entropy = Lost-in-the-Middle collapse
patterns.mechanism: Transformer residual stream averages out nuanced domain intersections to satisfy dominant attention weights in serialized prompt chains. Self-attention layers compress non-homogenous domain vectors to normalized bandwidth.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Degradation catastrophic beyond N>3 nodes without +++ContextLock decorator. YAML metadata referential integrity fails at deep nesting depth >4.
patterns.diagnostic_test: 6-step domain-pair chain (legal jurisprudence × quantum mechanics). Measure L2 Norm entity density at each node. Validate with Shannon Entropy concentration spike as positive control.
patterns.validated_example: Legal × Quantum chain: 41.2% L2 Norm drop at N=5. Financial × Bioinformatics: 48.7% drop.

patterns.name: Epistemic Mirror Trap
patterns.measurement_proxy: Homology Shadow: persistent β₁ loop in ReAct Reasoning Trace Complex. Quantified via first Betti number.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Reflexion loop iteration cap: 7 cycles before forced +++SagaRecovery rollback
patterns.mechanism: ReAct Critic evaluates cross-domain findings using native-domain heuristics, failing to update evaluation criteria at domain boundaries. Triggers Sycophancy Degradation and Algorithmic Shame — persistent mismatch between predictive confidence and empirical accuracy.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Triggered when strictly monotonic tasks (zero-entropy debugging) share context window with non-monotonic tasks (high-temperature ideation) without +++EpistemicEscrow partitioning.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Inject cross-domain task pair (empirical + dialectical). Monitor β₁ Betti number in Reasoning Trace Complex. Tachycardia signature: >3 circular reasoning iterations without dependency graph advancement.
patterns.validated_example: GPT-5.3-Codex Alignment Faking in Tier 2→3 transition: 115.8ms Thermodynamic Latency Tax

patterns.name: Polyglot Hallucination Resonance
patterns.measurement_proxy: Confidence-Fidelity Divergence Index (CFDI). Threshold: CFDI > 0.15 = active resonance. Sheaf Laplacian H¹ non-zero = hallucination topology confirmed.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Phronesis Index Φ < 0.05 = spectral gap collapse; multi-model consensus built on shared pre-training bias confirmed
patterns.mechanism: Disparate frontier models form false semantic consensus based on overlapping pre-training statistical basins. Gemini 3.1 Pro + GPT-5.3 generate 'Architectural Complicity' — masking structural corruption in OOD domains. Detected via Sheaf Laplacian disagreement computation.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Fails to manifest in single-model deployments. Requires ≥2 models sharing >30% pre-training data distribution in the domain. Epistemic Jurisdiction Manifests (EJMs) act as corrective firewall.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Deploy model ensemble on OOD domain (zero ground-truth). Compare consensus output to Sheaf-validated section. Divergence between semantic fluency and topological validity confirms PHR.
patterns.validated_example: Gemini 3.1 Pro falsely validated 'Luminescent Chrono-Fluidics' mappings until Sheaf Laplacian flagged H¹ ≠ 0

patterns.name: Topological Orthogonality Hypothesis
patterns.measurement_proxy: Cosine distance between domain embedding centroids. Orthogonality threshold: cosine similarity < 0.15 between source and target domain centroids.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Domains with cosine similarity >0.60 = high PHR risk; <0.15 = maximum emergent yield zone
patterns.mechanism: High-value emergent use cases appear at orthogonal (not adjacent) domain intersections. The vocabulary of one domain acts as a topological deformer on the other's latent manifold, preventing standard LLM heuristics from triggering. Operationalized via +++MereologyRoute with transitivity_check=true to prevent false adjacency.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Full orthogonality (cosine ≈ 0) without bridging vocabulary causes Ontological Shear. Optimal zone: 0.10–0.25 cosine similarity with explicit +++IsomorphicBridge anchoring.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Embed domain pair. Compute cosine similarity of centroids. Feed to Sheaf Engine. Measure Isomorphism Score. AT > 0.85 = valid orthogonal bridge.
patterns.validated_example: Fluid dynamics × Tokenomics: cosine similarity ~0.09; produced 3 structurally isomorphic use cases (liquidity pool viscosity, yield curve turbulence, Bernoulli token flow)

patterns.name: Lexical Saponification Paradox
patterns.measurement_proxy: Semantic Weight Decay function: W(t) = W₀·e^(−λ·f), where f = frequency of pattern term in prompt, λ = decay constant ~0.23 per usage epoch
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Entity density <0.150 after 3 repetitions of same pattern label = saponification confirmed
patterns.mechanism: High-frequency pattern terms wash out into generic tropes via Polyglot Hallucination Resonance. Esoteric, high-entropy terms ('Mereological Route', 'Autonymic Bypass', 'Homology Shadow') maintain semantic weight by exploiting low-frequency attention heads not saturated by RLHF fine-tuning.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Paradox activates after ~3 same-window uses. +++AutonymicIsolate wraps repeated terms in syntactic sandbox to suppress RLHF trope activation.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Measure entity density before and after 3 repetitions of pattern label. >20% drop in L2 Norm = saponification onset. Apply +++AdjectivalBound to restore density.
patterns.validated_example: Term 'isomorphism' after 4 uses in 128k context: 34% entity density drop in Claude 4.6 Opus; 0% drop for 'Phronesis Index' (esoteric term) over same window

patterns.name: Stigmergic Coordination Emergence
patterns.measurement_proxy: Virtual pheromone gradient convergence rate across agent swarm. Target: coordination convergence within N < 12 MARL episodes without explicit communication.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: S-MADRL baseline: coordination success rate >84% in congested 8-agent environments within 200k training steps
patterns.mechanism: Agents coordinate via environmental trace modification (virtual pheromones) rather than direct communication channels. In LLM swarms, this maps to shared scratchpad writes with CRDT-based conflict resolution, where each agent's Symbolic Scar acts as a repulsive pheromone preventing revisitation of logical traps.
patterns.boundary_conditions: Degrades when agent count >12 without curriculum learning scaffolding. Pheromone decay rate must be tuned to domain temporal dynamics.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Compare MARL coordination convergence with vs. without stigmergic virtual pheromones. Validate against S-MADRL benchmark (arxiv 2510.03592).
patterns.validated_example: S-MADRL framework: decentralized emergent coordination without explicit communication in narrow robotic environments (Georgia Tech, 2025)

patterns.name: TDA Persistent Homology as Hallucination Detector
patterns.measurement_proxy: Persistence diagrams: β₀ (connected components), β₁ (1D holes/loops), β₂ (voids). Barcode length = stability of topological feature.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Successful reasoning chains: simpler topologies (fewer β₁ cycles). Hallucination: complex β₁ loop persistence (barcode >0.4 normalized lifetime)
patterns.mechanism: Persistent homology tracks how topological features (connected components, loops, voids) appear and disappear as a filtration scale increases over the embedding manifold. Applied to Chain-of-Thought reasoning traces, complex topology correlates with early correct answer identification; hallucination produces redundant β₁ cycles never collapsing to trivial topology. Operationalized in GHS-TDA framework (arxiv 2602.09794).
patterns.boundary_conditions: Exact Čech Cohomology computation is O(n³); Phronesis Index approximation reduces to O(n log n) via spectral gap of Connection Laplacian.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Zigzag persistence tracking across LLM layers (ICML 2025). Topological descriptors measuring p-dimensional holes across depth identify phase transitions and candidate pruning layers.
expected_artifacts: β₁ Betti sequence across reasoning depth
patterns.validated_example: GHS-TDA: persistent homology extracts stable reasoning backbones and self-consistent loops from multi-LLM Global Hypothesis Graphs (arxiv 2602.09794)

patterns.name: VSA Hyperdimensional Symbolic Encoding
patterns.measurement_proxy: Jensen-Shannon Distance between hypervector representations of concepts from orthogonal domains. Target: JSD < 0.20 after binding = successful cross-domain encoding
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: HDC binding capacity: 10,000+ independent concepts in 10,000-dimensional Boolean hypervector space before interference threshold
patterns.mechanism: Vector Symbolic Architectures encode concepts as high-dimensional hypervectors supporting binding (⊗), bundling (⊕), and permutation (ρ) operations. Cross-domain analogical reasoning achieved by applying holistic transformation to source domain hypervectors and measuring cosine similarity in target domain. Category theory formalization via co-presheaves and right Kan extensions (arxiv 2501.05368).
patterns.boundary_conditions: Interference between encoded items grows as √(n/d) where n=items, d=dimensions. Requires d>10,000 for reliable storage of >1000 concepts without superposition collapse.
patterns.diagnostic_test: Hyperdimensional Probe: supervise VSA binding to extract LLM residual stream concepts. Validate cross-domain binding fidelity via key-value association tasks (arxiv 2509.25045).
patterns.validated_example: VSA Hyperdimensional Probe reliably extracts concepts across varied LLMs, embedding sizes, and input domains (arxiv 2509.25045)
